items.title: HS - Access Denied
items.description: Fast-paced cybersecurity game where players identify and improve weak passwords under time pressure, reinforcing secure decision-making and MFA concepts.
items.fullDescription: Access Denied is an interactive cybersecurity game designed to teach players how to create secure passwords and understand multi-factor authentication (MFA) through gameplay. The experience is built around fast-paced decision-making, where weak passwords fall dynamically on screen and players must quickly select the most secure alternative from multiple options. The game also includes an MFA module based on rapid matching mechanics, reinforcing security concepts through interaction and feedback.
items.learnings: This project established the foundation for future developments, both technically and conceptually. It provided hands-on experience in setting up the development environment, structuring UI systems, and defining reusable components. It also introduced iterative workflows through user testing and demos, shaping an early understanding of how feedback drives continuous improvement.

items.title: HS - Clean Up
items.description: Strategy-based game focused on identifying and eliminating sensitive data using the correct methods, emphasizing prioritization and decision-making.
items.fullDescription: Clean Up is a strategy-based cybersecurity game inspired by tower defense mechanics, where players must identify and eliminate different types of sensitive data using the correct methods. The gameplay emphasizes prioritization and decision-making, offering a slower-paced and more thoughtful experience. The design focuses on clarity and core interactions, guiding players to understand how different types of information should be handled.
items.learnings: This project marked a shift towards more structured and scalable development practices. It involved simplifying complex ideas into focused experiences while improving clarity and pacing. Additionally, it led to the creation of reusable templates and standardized workflows, significantly improving development efficiency across subsequent projects.

items.title: HS - The Rescue
items.description: Arcade-style game where players classify incoming files as malicious or safe in real time, combining reflex-based gameplay with cybersecurity learning.
items.fullDescription: The Rescue is an arcade-style cybersecurity game inspired by classic shooters like 1942, where players must identify and classify incoming files as malicious or safe in real time. The gameplay combines reflex-based interaction with decision-making under pressure, reinforced through contextual descriptions and scoring systems. The experience also includes support mechanics such as an antivirus power-up and a lightweight in-game assistant that provides guidance and context during gameplay.
items.learnings: As the most mature project, it consolidated previous knowledge into a more efficient and refined development process. It emphasized cleaner execution, faster iteration, and better use of tools, including mobile-oriented add-ons. It also introduced the integration of narrative elements into gameplay, expanding the scope of interactive design.

items.title: HS - Access Denied
items.description: Juego de ciberseguridad de ritmo rapido donde los jugadores identifican y mejoran contrasenas debiles bajo presion de tiempo, reforzando decisiones seguras y conceptos de MFA.
items.fullDescription: Access Denied es un juego interactivo de ciberseguridad disenado para ensenar a crear contrasenas seguras y comprender la autenticacion multifactor (MFA) mediante gameplay. La experiencia usa bucles de feedback interactivos y mecanicas basadas en decisiones para reforzar el aprendizaje.
items.learnings: Diseno e implementacion de sistemas centrales de gameplay, con foco en bucles de feedback y toma de decisiones del jugador. Mejore la capacidad de traducir conceptos abstractos de seguridad en mecanicas interactivas que impulsan engagement y retencion.

items.title: HS - Clean Up
items.description: Juego de estrategia enfocado en identificar y eliminar datos sensibles con los metodos correctos, enfatizando priorizacion y toma de decisiones.
items.fullDescription: Clean Up es un juego interactivo donde los jugadores aprenden a identificar y eliminar correctamente distintos tipos de datos. Inspirado en mecanicas de tower defense, combina estrategia y aprendizaje para reforzar buenas practicas de manejo de datos.
items.learnings: Trabajo en sistemas de gameplay que combinan estrategia y educacion. Aprendi a disenar mecanicas que fomentan la toma de decisiones manteniendo claridad y usabilidad.

items.title: HS - The Rescue
items.description: Juego estilo arcade donde los jugadores clasifican archivos entrantes como maliciosos o seguros en tiempo real, combinando reflejos con aprendizaje en ciberseguridad.
items.fullDescription: The Rescue es un juego inspirado en arcades donde los jugadores aprenden a identificar archivos maliciosos entre distintos tipos de archivos. El proyecto se enfoca en gameplay rapido combinado con toma de decisiones bajo presion.
items.learnings: Fortaleci la capacidad de disenar sistemas de feedback rapido y bucles de juego responsivos. Contribui a entregar el proyecto un mes antes de lo previsto, mejorando los tiempos de produccion.
